content.text:
ALL TRAFFIC ENTERING TEHRAN FIR FROM KABUL FIR 
SHALL CONTACT TEHRAN ACC NOT LESS THAN 5 MINUTES PRIOR 
TO ENTERING THE TEHRAN FIR 
AS FOLLOWS:
UL333 SOKAM 120.700 MHZ 
N636 PAMTU 120.700 MHZ
A453 GADER 123.900 MHZ 
Z627 RANRU 123.900 MHZ
ANY FLIGHT INTENDING TO ENTER KABUL FIR FROM TEHRAN FIR
AT THEIR OWN RISK WILL BE PROVIDED ATS ONLY
UNTIL THE TEHRAN/KABUL FIR BOUNDARY.

AIRSPACE SAFETY AND SECURITY WARNING: HAZARDOUS SITUATION 
WITHIN  THE TERRITORY AND AIRSPACE OF KABUL FIR(OAKX), ALL 
IRANIAN AIRLINE OPERATORS WHICH ARE PLANNING  TO FLY IN KABUL 
FIR INCLUDING ARRIVAL AND DEPARTURE  AT ALL AERODROMES WITHIN 
THIS FIR AND OVERFLYING  ARE ADVISED  TO TAKE THIS POTENTIAL 
RISK INTO ACCOUNT IN THEIR RISK ASSESSMENTS  AND ROUTEING 
DECISIONS, DUE TO LACK OF AIR TRAFFIC SERVICES  AND THE RISK 
POSED BY MILITANT ACTIVITY  AND LIMITED RISK MITIGATION 
CAPABILITIES IN AFGHANISTAN.

purpose.description: Selected for the immediate attention to aircraft operators

Operationally significant for IFR flights

content.text:
AIRSPACE SECURITY WARNING ISSUED 
BY IRAN CAA IN RESPONSE TO 
THE VOLATILE SECURITY SITUATION IN UKRAINE.
POTENTIAL RISK FM HEIGHTENED MILITARY ACTIVITY AND
DEDICATED ANTI-AVIATION WEAPONRY IN THE EAST OF UKRAINE,
AND THREAT POSED BY MISCALCULATION AND MISCOMMUNICATION.
IRANIAN REGISTERED AIR OPERATORS ARE ADVISED 
TO TAKE ALL POTENTIAL RISK INTO ACCOUNT IN RISK ASSESSMENT 
AND FLT PLANNING DECISIONS WHEN OPERATING
IN THE FLW FLIGHT INFORMATION REGIONS (FIR):
DNIPRO (UKDV), SIMFEROPOL (UKFV), LVIV (UKLV), ODESA (UKOV),
KYIV (UKBV), ROSTOV (URRV) AND MOLDOVA (LUUU).
FROM GND TO UNL)

AIRSPACE SAFETY AND SECURITY WARNING: OPERATORS ARE ADVISED 
NOT TO ENTER KHARTOUM FIR  WITHIN THE AIRSPACE OF SUDAN. 
POTENTIAL RISK FM ANTI-AIRCRAFT  WEAPONRY AND HEIGHTENED 
MILITARY ACTIVITY.  CONTACT DANASS OF IRAN CAA +982166078718 
AND ANS@CAA.GOV.IR   FOR FURTHER DETAILS. CHECK 
HTTPS://WWW.ICAO.INT/MID/PAGES/FIR/KHARTOUM-FIR-CONTINGENCY
-PLAN.ASPX 
FOR CONTINGENCY ROUTING PROCEDURE.

content.text: REF AIP PAGE ENR 5.1.3-12 , OID124 ACTIVATED .

AIRSPACE SAFETY AND SECURITY WARNING ISSUED BY IRAN CAA:
HAZARDOUS SITUATION OVER HIGH SEAS WITHIN FOLLOWING 
COORDINATES (IN SEQUENCE): 
1) 254600N 0570800E 
2) 254300N 0565000E 
3) 251200N 0571100E 
4) 244000N 0574800E 
5) 242200N 0584800E 
6) 235900N 0592100E 
7) 224400N 0605400E 
8) 204300N 0612300E 
9) 203000N 0641200E 
10) 224400N 0645500E 
11) 232600N 0654000E 
12) 244200N 0612100E 
13) 244800N 0612500E 
14) 250800N 0592600E 
15) 250700N 0585800E 
16) 252900N 0573000E 
THEN CLOSING TO THE POINT OF ORIGIN FROM MSL TO FL100.
DUE TO INCREASED MILITANT AND NAVAL ACTIVITIES, ELECTRONIC WARFARE 
AND AIR DEFENSE READINESS, ELEVATED RISKS EXIST: 
- MISIDENTIFICATION OF CIVIL AIRCRAFT 
- SUDDEN AIRSPACE RESTRICTIONS OR REROUTING 
- GNSS/GPS INTERFERENCE AND COM DISRUPTION 
- INCREASED MILITARY INTERCEPTIONS 
- SHORT NOTICE AIR ROUTE CLOSURES. 
ALL IRANIAN AIR OPERATOR HAVE TO EXERCISE EXTREME CAUTION.  
PERFORM ENHANCED RISK ASSESSMENTS PRIOR TO EACH FLIGHT.  
MONITOR NOTAMS, ATC, AND SECURITY ADVISORIES CONTINUOUSLY. 
HAVE CONTINGENCY PLANS FOR REROUTING, DIVERSION, COMM FAILURE AND 
UNEXPECTED RESTRICTIONS. 
COMPLY IMMEDIATELY WITH MILITARY/CIVIL ATC INSTRUCTIONS. 
CONSIDER END PART 1 OF 2
A1102/26 NOTAMN Q) OIIX/QAFXX/E//000/999/ A) OIIX  PART 2 OF 2  B) 2606020647  C) 2607021000EST  E) ALTERNATIVE ROUTING. END PART 2 OF 2

  (FOR TRAFFIC LANDING IN UAE FIR.

TEHRAN FIR RESUMED NORMAL OPERATION, OVERFLIGHT OPERATION IN
TEHRAN FIR IS SUBJECT TO FOLLOWING CONDITIONS:
- ATS SURVEILLANCE SERVICE WILL BE PROVIDED ABOVE FL285 SUBJECT TO
  RADAR COVERAGE,
- NON ATS SURVEILLANCE SEPARATION MINIMA (50 NM) FOR TRAFFIC ON
  SAME TRACK, SAME DIRECTION AND SAME LEVEL WILL BE APPLIED ON
  THE FOLLOWING TRANSFER OF CONTROL POINTS:
  IMLOT, GABKO, PATAT, ORSAR, DASUT, ELIDU, RAGAS, MIDSI, OBTAR,
  ALSER, PATIR, NANPI, TULAX, PAXAT, RAGET, BOXIX, ALRAM, BONAM,
  DASIS, AGINA, DULAV, MAGRI, PARSU, PAMTU, SOKAM AND RANRU,
- LARGER SEPARATION MAY BE APPLIED WITHIN TEHRAN FIR,
- INBOUND TRAFFIC SHALL CONTACT TEHRAN ACC 5 MIN PRIOR TO FIR
  BOUNDARY FOR IDENTIFICATION,
- OUTBOUIND TRAFFIC SHALL ESTABLISH COMMUNICATION WITH NEXT
  ACC 5 MIN PRIOR TO FIR BOUNDARY,
- FLIGHTS SHALL HAVE OPERATIONAL ACAS,
- FLIGHTS SHALL RETAIN THE LAST ASSIGNED SSR CODE, IF CODE HAS NOT
  BEEN ASSIGNED, USE SQUAWK 2000 UNTIL FURTHER INSTRUCTION BY ACC.

AREA WITHIN TEHRAN FIR FM  331147N 
0461217E-ALTET-EGVEL-RERET-YZD-NALBI-RIGUT-IVIVA  THENCE 
ALONG TEHRAN FIR BOUNDARY TO THE POINT OF ORIGIN,  ALL ACFT 
(IFR AND VFR) SHALL BE EQUIPPED WITH SSR TRANSPONDER  MODE S 
WITH ADS-B CAPABILITY OR ADS-B WITH DEDICATED 1090 MHZ ADS-B  
OUT CAPABILITY, EXCEPT FOR THOSE FLT ENGAGED IN HOSP 
OPERATION.

CAUTION TO ALL FLIGHTS, NEAR CONFLICT ZONE MAY BE EXTENDED OVER 
HIGH SEAS WITHIN TEHRAN FIR IN PERSIAN GULF AND PART OF OMAN SEA 
WEST OF MERIDIAN 059E AS THE RESULT OF SECURITY REASON.
